text: [Music]
what
[Music]
hi everyone welcome back to meaty
English I'm your host
Kelsey's today I'm going to teach you
ten english acronyms that are often used
on the internet idk idk stands for I
don't know and it's a very common
response used in texts or messages jk jk
stands for just kidding
people usually use it after they've said
something to explain that they weren't
serious they were just making a joke
it's also sometimes used when someone
wants to take back what they've just
said sm h sm h means shaking my head
it's used when someone finds something
stupid or ridiculous
since shaking your head at someone can
mean that you're annoyed or dismayed at
them
[Music]
TMI TMI stands for too much information
if someone tells you details about
something that you think are too private
or that you just don't want to hear you
can type TMI to let them know that
they've crossed the line NP NP is short
for no problem it's usually used as a
response with someone says thank you tbh
tbh stands for to be honest people
usually use this before they say
something honest or straightforward to
try to make it sound a bit less harsh I
[Music]
am h o IM h o stands for in my humble
opinion
someone might type this before they
share their opinion on something
in order to let people know that what
they're saying is only their opinion
it's not fact
[Music]
ROFL ROFL or ROFL stands for rolling on
the floor laughing it's a way to say
that something is hilarious and it's
similar to lol which stands for laughing
out loud but it's a bit more exaggerated
[Music]
TLDR TLDR stands for too long didn't
read people might send this in reply to
a message that was so long that they
didn't bother reading it some people
also write TL DR at the end of long
posts on line and then write a sentence
that lets people know their main point
[Music]
ttyl
ttyl stands for talk to you later
instead of just saying bye at the end of
every online conversation that you have
you can try saying
ttyl try making a sentence using one of
these acronyms in the comments below and
don't forget to Like and subscribe we
upload new videos every Tuesday at 7
p.m.
ttyl voice tubers
